title: Quantum Physics: The Secret Behind Your Tech!

scenes.narration: Ever wonder how your phone, MRI, or even lasers work at a fundamental level?
scenes.caption: Your tech's secret sauce?

scenes.narration: Turns out, 'classic' physics is great for big objects, but zoom in super small, and it totally breaks down.
scenes.caption: Classical physics: ❌ for tiny stuff

scenes.narration: That's why we need Quantum Mechanics! It's the language of the ultra-tiny.
scenes.caption: Enter: Quantum Mechanics ⚛️

scenes.narration: Imagine light acting like both a wave *and* a particle. And guess what? Even YOU, made of matter, have wave-like properties!
scenes.caption: You're a wave, Harry! 🌊

scenes.narration: And here's the wild part: you can't perfectly know a particle's exact position AND its momentum at the exact same time. It's called the Uncertainty Principle.
scenes.caption: Uncertainty Principle 🤯

scenes.narration: This mind-bending quantum reality is *why* we have modern tech like advanced chips, medical scanners, and even life itself!
scenes.caption: Powering YOUR future 🚀

scenes.narration: Ready to explore the weird and wonderful world that makes everything possible? Let's get quantum!
scenes.caption: Mind blown yet? Follow for more! ✨
